tasks.subject: Task 1: GBLP1 manifest entry — wire format + host-testable parser
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define GBLP1_TYPE_MANIFEST=0x0020 constants in tools/shared/gblp1.h, add gbl_payload_find_manifest() to PayloadParse.c, cover absence/present/malformed cases with tests/host/093_manifest_parse.sh.

**Files:** tools/shared/gblp1.h, GblChainloadPkg/Library/GblPayloadLib/{Internal/PayloadParse.h,PayloadParse.c}, tests/host/093_manifest_parse.sh, tests/host/helpers/test_manifest_parse.c, tests/host/helpers/Makefile

**Verify:** bash tests/host/093_manifest_parse.sh → "093_manifest_parse: OK (8/8)"

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/shared/gblp1.h", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/GblPayloadLib/Internal/PayloadParse.h", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/GblPayloadLib/PayloadParse.c", "tests/host/093_manifest_parse.sh", "tests/host/helpers/test_manifest_parse.c", "tests/host/helpers/Makefile"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/093_manifest_parse.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["gblp1.h defines manifest constants", "PayloadParse.h declares struct + parser", "new error codes added", "parser validates payload correctly", "093 test 8/8 pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: GblPayload_LoadManifest API + gManifest global; BootFlow load
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose parser through GblPayloadLib as GblPayload_LoadManifest(); define firmware-side gManifest global; wire into BootFlow.c with runtime profile-spoof gate.

**Files:** GblChainloadPkg/Include/Library/GblPayloadLib.h, GblChainloadPkg/Library/GblPayloadLib/GblPayload.c, GblChainloadPkg/Application/GblChainload/BootFlow.c

**Verify:** Firmware EDK2 build succeeds for any GBL_MODE input.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["GblChainloadPkg/Include/Library/GblPayloadLib.h", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/GblPayloadLib/GblPayload.c", "GblChainloadPkg/Application/GblChainload/BootFlow.c"], "verifyCommand": "bash scripts/build.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GblManifest struct + LoadManifest API declared", "gManifest defined as global", "BootFlow loads manifest + runtime-gates Mode2_SetProfile", "firmware builds cleanly"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: gbl-pack --manifest <bits> emits manifest entry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Teach gbl-pack to emit a GBLP1_TYPE_MANIFEST entry when --manifest <bits> is passed. Round-trip tested against Task 1 parser.

**Files:** tools/gbl-pack/{pack.h,pack.c,gbl-pack.c}, tests/host/094_gbl_pack_manifest.sh

**Verify:** bash tests/host/094_gbl_pack_manifest.sh exits 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/gbl-pack/pack.h", "tools/gbl-pack/pack.c", "tools/gbl-pack/gbl-pack.c", "tests/host/094_gbl_pack_manifest.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/094_gbl_pack_manifest.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["--manifest emits GMAN entry parser can decode", "no --manifest = no entry", "hex+decimal accepted", "reserved bit rejected exit 2"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: gblp1-inspect pretty-prints manifest entry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a manifest-aware case to gblp1-inspect so users can see capability bits without hex-diving.

**Files:** tools/gblp1-inspect/gblp1-inspect.c, tests/host/089_gblp1_inspect.sh

**Verify:** bash tests/host/089_gblp1_inspect.sh exits 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/gblp1-inspect/gblp1-inspect.c", "tests/host/089_gblp1_inspect.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/089_gblp1_inspect.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["inspect prints manifest section with magic/schema/bits", "089 test asserts the rendering"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Restructure DynamicPatchLib (abl_permissive/, oem/oplus/, retired/) + split per-patch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure filesystem + symbol restructure. mode_1/mode_1.c splits into per-patch files under abl_permissive/; oem/oneplus_canoe.c → oem/oplus/bypass_warning.c; universal/universal.c → retired/block_efisp_recursion.c. Patch behavior unchanged.

**Files:** GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/{abl_permissive/,oem/oplus/,retired/,DynamicPatchLib.inf,PatchTable.c}, tools/abl-patcher/Makefile, tools/gbl-pack/Makefile

**Verify:** bash tests/host/run-all.sh exit 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/abl_permissive/", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/oem/oplus/", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/retired/", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/DynamicPatchLib.inf", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/PatchTable.c", "tools/abl-patcher/Makefile", "tools/gbl-pack/Makefile"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/run-all.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["old dirs/files removed", "new files declare renamed arrays", "retired/ has retirement docstring", "DynamicPatchLib.inf excludes oem/*", "all tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: PatchScope enum rename + host-only OEM gate in PatchTable
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rename GBL_OEM_ONEPLUS → GBL_OEM_OPLUS, SCOPE_MODE_1 → SCOPE_ABL_PERMISSIVE, SCOPE_OEM_ONEPLUS → SCOPE_OEM_OPLUS. Confirm OEM extern decls are #ifdef __HOST_BUILD__ in PatchTable.c.

**Files:** GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/{PatchScope.h,PatchTable.c}, GblChainloadPkg/Include/Library/PatchDesc.h, the renamed patch .c files (.Scope updates), tools/abl-patcher/abl-patcher.c

**Verify:** make -s -C tools/abl-patcher && bash tests/host/083_abl_patcher_oem.sh both pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/PatchScope.h", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/PatchTable.c", "GblChainloadPkg/Include/Library/PatchDesc.h", "tools/abl-patcher/abl-patcher.c"], "verifyCommand": "make -s -C tools/abl-patcher && bash tests/host/083_abl_patcher_oem.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["enum + scope renames done", "OEM extern decls host-only via #ifdef", "no stale references in tree", "abl-patcher builds + tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Rename Mode1Overlay → FakelockOverlay, Mode2{Overlay,Rewrite} → Profile{Overlay,Rewrite}
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure C-side rename. Compile-time #if (GBL_MODE == N) gates PRESERVED — swap to runtime in Task 8.

**Files:** GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/{FakelockOverlay,ProfileOverlay,ProfileRewrite}.{c,h}, ProtocolHookLib.inf, {VerifiedBootHook,QseecomHook,SpssHook}.c, GblChainloadPkg/Application/GblChainload/BootFlow.c

**Verify:** bash tests/host/078_profile_rewrite.sh (or 078_mode2_rewrite.sh) passes; firmware EDK2 build succeeds.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/FakelockOverlay.c", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/FakelockOverlay.h", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/ProfileOverlay.c", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/ProfileOverlay.h", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/ProfileRewrite.c", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/ProfileRewrite.h", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/ProtocolHookLib.inf", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/VerifiedBootHook.c", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/QseecomHook.c", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/SpssHook.c", "GblChainloadPkg/Application/GblChainload/BootFlow.c"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/run-all.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all renames applied", "all includes updated", "no stale Mode1*/Mode2* references", "firmware + tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Replace #if (GBL_MODE) with runtime gManifest gates in InstallAll + hooks
Task 9: BlockIoHook EFISP gate — return EFI_NO_MEDIA on EFISP records
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add IsEfisp flag to BLOCK_IO_HOOK_RECORD, detect EFISP partition by GPT name at install, short-circuit Hooked{Read,Write}Blocks with EFI_NO_MEDIA on those records. Makes patch1 redundant.

**Files:** GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/BlockIoHook.c

**Verify:** EDK2 firmware build succeeds; on-device confirmation deferred to Task 16.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["GblChainloadPkg/Library/ProtocolHookLib/BlockIoHook.c"], "verifyCommand": "bash scripts/build.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["IsEfisp field added", "install-time detection via partition name", "Hooked{Read,Write}Blocks short-circuit with EFI_NO_MEDIA", "firmware builds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Retire patch1 + drop PatchEngine post-patch efisp scan; gbl-pack warn-only
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Drop patch1 entry from kUniversalPatches[] (array empty), drop PatchEngine.c post-patch efisp invariant scan, downgrade gbl-pack efisp_scan to warning, delete 062_efisp_scan_gate.sh.

**Files:** GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/retired/block_efisp_recursion.c, GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/Internal/PatchEngine.c, tools/gbl-pack/{pack.c,gbl-pack.c}, delete tests/host/062_efisp_scan_gate.sh

**Verify:** bash tests/host/run-all.sh exit 0; no 062 in output.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/retired/block_efisp_recursion.c", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/Internal/PatchEngine.c", "tools/gbl-pack/pack.c", "tools/gbl-pack/gbl-pack.c"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/run-all.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["kUniversalPatches array removed", "post-patch efisp scan deleted", "gbl-pack warns + exits 0", "062 test deleted", "all remaining tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Drop GBL_MODE compile-time flag — collapse to single EFI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Eliminate GBL_MODE from the build. .dsc no longer DEFINEs it; BuildOptions no longer emits -DGBL_MODE; scripts collapse the per-mode loop to a single build producing dist/gbl-chainload.efi.

**Files:** GblChainloadPkg/{GblChainloadPkg.dsc,Application/GblChainload/GblChainload.inf,Library/DynamicPatchLib/DynamicPatchLib.inf,Library/DynamicPatchLib/PatchTable.c}, scripts/build*.sh, .github/workflows/*

**Verify:** bash scripts/build.sh produces dist/gbl-chainload.efi.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["GblChainloadPkg/GblChainloadPkg.dsc", "GblChainloadPkg/Application/GblChainload/GblChainload.inf", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/DynamicPatchLib.inf", "GblChainloadPkg/Library/DynamicPatchLib/PatchTable.c", "scripts/build.sh", "scripts/build-inside-docker.sh", ".github/workflows/"], "verifyCommand": "bash scripts/build.sh && ls -l dist/gbl-chainload.efi", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no GBL_MODE references in build system", "single EFI artifact produced", "release workflows updated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: abl-patcher — drop --no-mode1, --oem oplus canonical + oneplus alias
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Always-apply abl_permissive at host. Drop --no-mode1 / --no-libavb-bypass. --oem oplus canonical; --oem oneplus accepted with stderr deprecation note.

**Files:** tools/abl-patcher/{abl-patcher.c,Makefile}, tests/host/083_abl_patcher_oem.sh

**Verify:** bash tests/host/083_abl_patcher_oem.sh passes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/abl-patcher/abl-patcher.c", "tools/abl-patcher/Makefile", "tests/host/083_abl_patcher_oem.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/083_abl_patcher_oem.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["--no-mode1 removed", "--oem oplus canonical", "--oem oneplus deprecation msg", "abl_permissive always applied", "083 test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: efisp-package.py — single base EFI, --manifest, decouple --oem from --mode
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Switch host packaging to single-EFI world. --efi points at gbl-chainload.efi; --oem allowed in any mode; gbl-pack --manifest <bits> derived from --mode.

**Files:** scripts/efisp-package.py, tests/host/085_efisp_package.sh

**Verify:** bash tests/host/085_efisp_package.sh passes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/efisp-package.py", "tests/host/085_efisp_package.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/085_efisp_package.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["--oem decoupled from --mode", "--manifest derived from --mode", "no --no-mode1 passed to abl-patcher", "test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 14: Install scripts — single base EFI, M_MANIFEST_BITS, detect_oem moved
tasks.description:
**Goal:** mode-{0,1,2}-install.sh stop selecting per-mode EFIs. install-common.sh's build_payload derives manifest bits from M_MANIFEST_BITS. detect_oem moves into install-common.sh.

**Files:** zip/modes/{install-common.sh,mode-0-install.sh,mode-1-install.sh,mode-2-install.sh}, zip/update-tools.sh, tests/host/{071,073}*.sh

**Verify:** bash tests/host/071_zip_assembly.sh && bash tests/host/073_install_assembly.sh both pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zip/modes/install-common.sh", "zip/modes/mode-0-install.sh", "zip/modes/mode-1-install.sh", "zip/modes/mode-2-install.sh", "zip/update-tools.sh", "tests/host/071_zip_assembly.sh", "tests/host/073_install_assembly.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/071_zip_assembly.sh && bash tests/host/073_install_assembly.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["per-mode scripts use single EFI + M_MANIFEST_BITS", "detect_oem in install-common", "--manifest passed to gbl-pack", "zip tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 15: Test housekeeping — 088 argv update + run-all green
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Final test sweep. 088_patch7_multi_abl.sh drops --no-mode1 (flag gone post-Task 12). Any other tests still grepping retired symbols/paths get fixed. Full run-all green.

**Files:** tests/host/088_patch7_multi_abl.sh + any straggler tests

**Verify:** bash tests/host/run-all.sh exit 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/host/088_patch7_multi_abl.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/run-all.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["088 no longer uses --no-mode1", "no retired symbol references in tests/scripts/tools/zip", "full suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 16: On-device boot validation — mode 0/1/2 against single EFI [USER GATE]
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Validate end-to-end that the single-EFI build, packed with each install preset (mode 0 / mode 1 / mode 2), boots cleanly on the infiniti test device via `fastboot stage` + `oem boot-efi`. Merge gate.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** This task was requested by the user in the current conversation. It MUST NOT be closed by walking around it, by declaring it "verified inline", or by substituting a cheaper check. Close only after every item in `acceptanceCriteria` has been re-validated independently, with output captured.

**Files:** None — runtime verification gate.

**Verify:** Per mode-N: fastboot stage + oem boot-efi then verify chainload log + getprop. Each evidence axis must be captured independently.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "for m in 0 1 2; do fastboot stage dist/efisp-payload/infiniti-mode$m.efi && fastboot oem boot-efi && echo \"mode-$m booted; capture chainload log + getprop\"; done", "acceptanceCriteria": ["mode-0 boots with fakelock=0 profile_spoof=0 + locked=0", "mode-1 boots with fakelock=1 + locked=1 + verifiedbootstate=green", "mode-2 boots with profile_spoof=1 + attestation indicators pass + 0 vb-fakelock lines", "BlockIoHook EFISP refusal logged each boot"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requiresUserSpecification": false, "requireEvidenceTokens": [["mode-0", "fakelock=0"], ["mode-1", "fakelock=1"], ["mode-2", "profile_spoof=1"]]}
```
